summary: Complete refactor testing passed. All critical first-launch flow issues have been fixed. Onboarding flow works end-to-end (intro screen -> category selection -> GDPR acceptance -> home screen with news). Returning user flow correctly bypasses onboarding and loads news directly. Backend API tests all pass (8/8).

issues: Some tab clicks have overlay interception issues in web view (element intercepts pointer events)
This is likely a React Native Web specific rendering issue and may not affect native mobile app

critical_code_review_comments: Unified storage system using AsyncStorage is working correctly
useNews hook properly tries API first without network pre-checks
Categories passed via URL params work correctly for first launch
Returning user state detection working properly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Complete refactor testing done. All first-launch issues fixed. Unified storage, simplified useNews hook, and clean onboarding flow all working correctly.

first_launch_flow.intro_screen: WORKING - Welcome to Verityn screen displays correctly with features list
first_launch_flow.category_selection: WORKING - 7 categories selectable/deselectable, counter shows '3 of 7 selected'
first_launch_flow.gdpr_checkbox: WORKING - Blocks continue until checked, Terms & Privacy Policy link works
first_launch_flow.start_reading: WORKING - Navigates to home with selected categories

home_screen.news_loading: WORKING - News loads immediately after onboarding completes
home_screen.no_stories_found_bug: FIXED - No longer appears on first launch
home_screen.something_went_wrong_bug: FIXED - No error messages on fresh launch
home_screen.category_pills: WORKING - My Feed, Politics, Business, Technology filters work
home_screen.category_filtering: WORKING - Clicking filters shows appropriate articles

article_card_display.hero_image: WORKING - ~50% of card height with gradient overlay
article_card_display.source_badge: WORKING - BBC POLITICS, TECHRADAR, NY TIMES TECH etc.
article_card_display.category_badge: WORKING - POLITICS, TECHNOLOGY, BUSINESS in orange
article_card_display.title: WORKING - Headlines with serif font
article_card_display.description: WORKING - Article preview text truncated properly
article_card_display.timestamp: WORKING - '2 minutes ago', '6 minutes ago' etc.
article_card_display.read_full_story: WORKING - Orange link with arrow icon
article_card_display.bookmark_share_icons: WORKING - Icons visible in top right of image

returning_user_flow.skip_onboarding: WORKING - Goes directly to home after reload

tab_navigation.settings_tab: WORKING - Shows appearance, offline reading, notifications, categories
